abilities.description: When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.ae5994ceb3cba098]{Strike} or @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.723192c97fec4fe2]{Clash} in close quarters, you may suffer -1 momentum and mark progress on a hit (decide before rolling).

When you have your axe in hand, and use the promise of violence to @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.9f538fabf8998c5b]{Compel}, @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.a2d7793b23c17489]{Secure an Advantage}, or @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.3f5a834fa3fea5d1]{Gain Ground}, add +1 and take +1 momentum on a hit.

When you make a tribute to a fallen foe (formidable or greater) by carving a rune in the haft of your axe, roll +heart. On a strong hit, mark +1d6 progress (one time only) when you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.ae5994ceb3cba098]{Strike} or @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.723192c97fec4fe2]{Clash}. On a weak hit, as above, but this death weighs on you; @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.ff32c523829d6481]{Endure Stress} (-2).
